chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3461 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.19593/2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.4333/2021 09.08.2021 Mr. Abdul Samad Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. ------------ Malik Altaf Hussain Advocate files Memo of Appearance on behalf of KMC which is taken on record. 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. The report submitted by MIT-II was disposed of on 24.09.2020 whereby notices were issued to the Medical Superintendent Leprosy Hospital KMC Karachi to submit report regarding the present status of the appeal filed by the petitioner. The Bench was informed on 01.02.2021 that appeal of the petitioner came to the conclusion that he was far below as far as petitioner is concerned and does not fulfill the required qualification/criteria. This petition was disposed of on 3.10.2019 by consent that the appeal of the petitioner be decided after hearing. This being the situation, even the report was disposed of on 24.9.2020. Finally the report was taken on record on 01.02.2021. Consequent upon the disposal of this petition and subsequent orders this Review Application has been filed to review order dated 01.02.2021. Petition has already served its purpose and if at all the petitioner was aggrieved of the conclusion, as far as appeal is concerned the Bench observed that he may pursue his remedy as far as entitlement of the petitioner is concerned. There is nothing to review the order dated 01.02.2021. The review application stands dismissed.
There is nothing to review the order dated 01.02.2021. The review application stands dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
